examples: She knows exactly how to tug at readers' heartstrings.
So I try again and tug at the heartstrings.
What happened next will pull at your heartstrings.
Carrie Watts in Horton Foote's "The Trip to Bountiful" may tug at Tony's heartstrings.
I'm hoping this appeal tugs on somebody's heartstrings and that pendant makes its way back to us.
